import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    let tok = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = a.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut work = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    mut min_idx = -1
    mut min_val = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let v = match work.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v != 9223372036854775807
        if min_idx == -1 or v < min_val
          min_idx = i
          min_val = v
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    mut new_work: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      let v = match work.get(j)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if j == min_idx
        new_work = list.push(new_work, 9223372036854775807)
      else
        new_work = list.push(new_work, v)
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    work = new_work
    k = k + 1
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end
let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_ints(inter)
let n = sorted.len()

if n == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
